title: StarHUD Hotbar
description: A custom hotbar resourcepack for the StarHUD mod by Finside.
body:
A smooth and modern styled Minecraft hotbar, made to be used with [StarHUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/starhud), a mod made by [Finside](https://modrinth.com/user/Finside).

<details open>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>

A smushed preview of what the resourcepack changes.

![A smushed preview of what the resourcepack changes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efe66f20b44015c98049c2f238e9656cf38135a8.png)

In-game screenshots. Both were taken with StarHUD enabled (and Feather client day counter).

![In-game screenshot 1. Taken with StarHUD enabled (and Feather client day counter).](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab7033c0dcdaf19c760294b9a4a0d0954e2df912.png)
![In-game screenshot 2. Taken with StarHUD enabled (and Feather client day counter).](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af3f01d45128235f74f90341155945905ea80285.png)
</details>

---

### CREDITS
Icon and Banner originally made by [Finside](https://modrinth.com/user/Finside), edited by [me](https://modrinth.com/user/error_dev_yt).

Most color are from the original mod assets, taken from [Color Hunt](https://colorhunt.co/palettes/pastel).

Main color is `#e5ecf8`.

All other assets in this resourcepack are all made by [me](https://modrinth.com/user/error_dev_yt).
